upi.note: Add your UPI ID from the admin panel before public launch.

payments.notes: Only UPI is enabled. Recharge requests stay pending until admin verifies the UPI payment.

delivery.notes: No third-party delivery API is connected. Pickup, verification, and delivery are handled by the internal GIVE & TAKE partner panel.
